name: pr-writeup
description: Standalone HTML pull-request writeup for reviewers: TL;DR, motivation with before/after, a file-by-file tour with code, review-focus callouts, a test plan, and a staged rollout.

slots.description: PR title; used in <title> and the h1.
PR number, woven into the h1 (e.g. '#312 — ...').
Header meta stats: file count, diff stat, branches, author.
The request that produced this writeup.
Motivation prose explaining why the change is needed.
One collapsible block per changed file.
Test-plan rows; add class 'done' when verified.
One-line framing of the rollout plan.

shape.change[]: { file: string, badge: enum[new,mod,del], lines: string (diff stat), why: string, code: string (optional snippet) }
shape.testPlan[]: { step: string (label), expectation: string (note), done: boolean }
shape.rollout[]: { when: string, pct: string, d: string }
